vocab.example: I would like to ask for a raise this year.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi muốn xin tăng lương trong năm nay.

vocab.meaning_vi: đánh giá hiệu suất làm việc
vocab.example: My performance review is scheduled for next week.
vocab.example_vi: Buổi đánh giá hiệu suất của tôi được lên lịch vào tuần tới.

vocab.example: She got a promotion to senior developer last month.
vocab.example_vi: Cô ấy được thăng chức lên senior developer tháng trước.

vocab.example: We offer a monthly allowance for lunch and transportation.
vocab.example_vi: Chúng tôi có trợ cấp hàng tháng cho ăn trưa và đi lại.

vocab.example: You get twelve days of annual leave per year.
vocab.example_vi: Bạn có mười hai ngày phép năm mỗi năm.

vocab.example: Please read your contract carefully before signing.
vocab.example_vi: Vui lòng đọc kỹ hợp đồng trước khi ký.

vocab.example: I think this salary offer is fair for my experience.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi nghĩ mức lương đề nghị này công bằng với kinh nghiệm của tôi.

vocab.example: I believe my skills are worth a higher salary.
vocab.example_vi: Tôi tin rằng kỹ năng của mình xứng đáng với mức lương cao hơn.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Hoa, do you have a minute? I'd like to talk about my performance review.

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: Sure, Minh. Your manager gave you very good feedback this year.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Thank you. Based on that, I would like to ask for a raise.

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: That's reasonable. What number did you have in mind?

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: I believe my skills are worth around a fifteen percent increase.

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: I understand. We also have a promotion opportunity for you, actually.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: Really? That would be great news.

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: Yes, with the promotion, the salary increase would be fair for both.

lines.speaker: Minh
lines.text: That sounds wonderful. What about the contract and annual leave?

lines.speaker: Hoa (HR)
lines.text: We will update your contract, and your annual leave stays the same.

questions.q: Why does Minh ask for a raise?
options: He got good feedback in his performance review

questions.q: What does Hoa offer besides a raise?

shadowing: Do you have a minute? I'd like to talk about my performance review.
Based on that feedback, I would like to ask for a raise this year.
I believe my skills are worth around a fifteen percent increase.
We also have a promotion opportunity for you this quarter, actually.
We will update your contract soon, and your annual leave stays the same.
